requirement_topic.en: ST Mandatory Energy Efficiency Label — Air Conditioners and Heat Pump Mode
requirement_topic.zh: ST强制能效标签——空调器及热泵模式
requirement_topic.zht: ST強制能效標籤——空調器及熱泵模式

summary.en: Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST), Malaysia's Energy Commission, mandates the energy efficiency labelling scheme for air conditioners (including units operating in heat pump mode) under the Energy Efficiency and Conservation Act and associated regulations. Products must display the ST five-star energy label and meet minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) expressed as a minimum EER (Energy Efficiency Ratio) before they may be sold. Importers and manufacturers must register the model with ST and obtain approval before placing units on the market.
summary.zh: 苏汉嘉亚腾纳（ST，马来西亚能源委员会）依据《能源效率与节约法》及相关法规，对包括热泵模式运行在内的空调器实施强制能效标签制度。产品须在销售前展示ST五星能效标签并满足以最低能效比（EER）表示的最低能效标准（MEPS）。进口商和制造商须在上市前向ST注册型号并取得批准。
summary.zht: 蘇漢嘉亞騰納（ST，馬來西亞能源委員會）依據《能源效率與節約法》及相關法規，對包括熱泵模式運行在內的空調器實施強制能效標籤制度。產品須在銷售前展示ST五星能效標籤並滿足以最低能效比（EER）表示的最低能效標準（MEPS）。進口商和製造商須在上市前向ST註冊型號並取得批准。

standards_or_laws: Efficient Management of Electrical Energy Regulations 2008 (Malaysia)
ST Mandatory Energy Efficiency Labelling Scheme for Air Conditioners
MS 2147 — Energy performance of air conditioners (aligned with MEPS)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency label (中国能效标识) for air conditioners is administered by SAMR / NEA under GB 21455 (room air conditioners MEPS and grading). China uses SEER / APF metrics. The Chinese energy label and GB 21455 MEPS registration are domestic-market credentials and are not accepted as ST energy label or MEPS registration evidence in Malaysia.
summary.zh: 中国空调强制能效标识（中国能效标识）由市场监管总局/国家能源局依据GB 21455（房间空调器能效限额及等级）管理，采用SEER / APF指标。中国能效标识及GB 21455 MEPS备案属于国内市场资质，不被接受为马来西亚ST能效标签或MEPS注册证据。
summary.zht: 中國空調強制能效標識（中國能效標識）由市場監管總局/國家能源局依據GB 21455（房間空調器能效限額及等級）管理，採用SEER / APF指標。中國能效標識及GB 21455 MEPS備案屬於國內市場資質，不被接受為馬來西亞ST能效標籤或MEPS註冊證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners
China mandatory energy efficiency label (中国能效标识)

gap.en: China's energy label and GB 21455 MEPS registration are not recognised in Malaysia. Exporters must test to Malaysia's EER-based MEPS thresholds, register the model with ST, obtain label approval, and affix the ST five-star label before sale. EER performance data must reflect 240 V / 50 Hz operating conditions.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识和GB 21455 MEPS备案不被马来西亚承认。出口商须按马来西亚基于EER的MEPS门槛进行测试，向ST注册型号，取得标签批准，并在销售前粘贴ST五星能效标签。EER性能数据须反映240V / 50Hz工况。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識和GB 21455 MEPS備案不被馬來西亞承認。出口商須按馬來西亞基於EER的MEPS門檻進行測試，向ST註冊型號，取得標籤批准，並在銷售前粘貼ST五星能效標籤。EER性能數據須反映240V / 50Hz工況。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ST energy label and MEPS registration required before sale in Malaysia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market under China energy efficiency label scheme; not recognised as equivalent to ST scheme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — ST mandatory energy label and MEPS registration are required before sale; Chinese energy label and GB 21455 data are not accepted; re-testing at 240 V / 50 Hz and ST model registration are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——销售前须完成ST强制能效标签及MEPS注册；中国能效标识和GB 21455数据不被接受；须在240V / 50Hz条件下重新测试并完成ST型号注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——銷售前須完成ST強制能效標籤及MEPS註冊；中國能效標識和GB 21455數據不被接受；須在240V / 50Hz條件下重新測試並完成ST型號註冊。

requirement_topic.en: Voltage and Grid Compatibility — 240 V (MY) vs 220 V (CN)
requirement_topic.zh: 电压及电网兼容性——240V（马来西亚）与220V（中国）
requirement_topic.zht: 電壓及電網相容性——240V（馬來西亞）與220V（中國）

summary.en: Malaysia operates at 240 V single-phase (±6%), 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz. The ST energy label and MEPS testing must be conducted at Malaysian voltage conditions. Heat pumps and air conditioners designed and rated for China's 220 V nominal must be verified to operate safely and achieve declared EER performance within the 240 V Malaysian supply range. Units must be permanently marked with the correct rated voltage for the Malaysian market. Plugs must conform to BS 1363 (Type G, three-pin) for household applications.
summary.zh: 马来西亚采用240V单相（±6%）、415V三相、50Hz供电。ST能效标签及MEPS测试须在马来西亚电压条件下进行。按中国220V额定设计的热泵和空调须验证在240V马来西亚电压范围内能安全运行并达到申报EER性能。产品须永久性标注适用于马来西亚市场的正确额定电压。家用产品插头须符合BS 1363（G型，三脚插头）。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞採用240V單相（±6%）、415V三相、50Hz供電。ST能效標籤及MEPS測試須在馬來西亞電壓條件下進行。按中國220V額定設計的熱泵和空調須驗證在240V馬來西亞電壓範圍內能安全運行並達到申報EER性能。產品須永久性標注適用於馬來西亞市場的正確額定電壓。家用產品插頭須符合BS 1363（G型，三腳插頭）。

standards_or_laws: TNB (Tenaga Nasional Berhad) supply voltage standard: 240 V ±6%, 50 Hz
MS 1696 — Specification for plugs, socket outlets and adaptors (incorporating BS 1363 Type G)
ST MEPS testing conditions for energy label

summary.en: China's standard supply is 220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Units rated for 220 V nominal are standard for the Chinese domestic market. The 50 Hz frequency is the same as Malaysia; however, the 20 V difference in nominal single-phase voltage (220 V CN vs 240 V MY) must be accounted for in design, rated-voltage marking, and EER test conditions. Most modern inverter units tolerate a wider input range (e.g. 198–264 V), but this must be verified and documented for the Malaysian market.
summary.zh: 中国标准供电为220V单相、380V三相、50Hz。按220V额定的产品是中国国内市场的标准。频率50Hz与马来西亚相同；但单相额定电压差20V（中国220V对比马来西亚240V）须在设计、额定电压标注及EER测试条件上加以确认。大多数现代变频机组支持较宽输入范围（如198–264V），但须为马来西亚市场核实并记录。
summary.zht: 中國標準供電為220V單相、380V三相、50Hz。按220V額定的產品是中國國內市場的標準。頻率50Hz與馬來西亞相同；但單相額定電壓差20V（中國220V對比馬來西亞240V）須在設計、額定電壓標注及EER測試條件上加以確認。大多數現代變頻機組支持較寬輸入範圍（如198–264V），但須為馬來西亞市場核實並記錄。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7725 — Room air conditioners (test method, 220 V reference conditions)
GB 25454 — Heat pump water heater for commercial use

gap.en: Frequency is aligned (both 50 Hz). Single-phase nominal voltage differs by 20 V (CN 220 V vs MY 240 V). Exporters must confirm the unit's operating input voltage range covers 240 V ±6%, update the rated-voltage marking on the nameplate for the Malaysian market, and conduct MEPS / EER testing at 240 V conditions. Plug type must be changed from Chinese flat-pin (Type A/I) to BS 1363 Type G. Failure to verify voltage compatibility may affect safety and EER performance declarations.
gap.zh: 频率一致（均为50Hz）。单相额定电压相差20V（中国220V对比马来西亚240V）。出口商须确认机组工作输入电压范围覆盖240V±6%，更新铭牌上适用于马来西亚市场的额定电压标注，并在240V条件下进行MEPS / EER测试。插头须从中国扁脚（A/I型）更换为BS 1363 G型三脚插头。未经电压兼容性验证可能影响安全性和EER性能申报。
gap.zht: 頻率一致（均為50Hz）。單相額定電壓相差20V（中國220V對比馬來西亞240V）。出口商須確認機組工作輸入電壓範圍覆蓋240V±6%，更新銘牌上適用於馬來西亞市場的額定電壓標注，並在240V條件下進行MEPS / EER測試。插頭須從中國扁腳（A/I型）更換為BS 1363 G型三腳插頭。未經電壓相容性驗證可能影響安全性和EER性能申報。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — correct voltage rating, 240 V MEPS test conditions, and Type G plug required for Malaysian market
mandatory_status.cn: 220 V / 50 Hz standard for Chinese domestic market; Type A or I plug; not automatically compatible with MY 240 V requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Moderate-to-major gap — frequency is aligned (50 Hz) but nominal voltage is higher in Malaysia (240 V vs CN 220 V); voltage range compatibility, nameplate marking, MEPS test conditions, and plug type (BS 1363 Type G) must all be verified and updated for the Malaysian market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中等至重大差距——频率一致（50Hz），但马来西亚额定电压更高（240V对比中国220V）；电压范围兼容性、铭牌标注、MEPS测试条件及插头类型（BS 1363 G型）均须核实并针对马来西亚市场更新。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中等至重大差距——頻率一致（50Hz），但馬來西亞額定電壓更高（240V對比中國220V）；電壓範圍相容性、銘牌標注、MEPS測試條件及插頭類型（BS 1363 G型）均須核實並針對馬來西亞市場更新。
